results.title: World Cup 2026 the Soccer Final Written for Messi: Will Spain Be the Spoiler? Argentina-Spain Sunday at 2pm
results.description: Lionel Messi's final tango is this Sunday in New York. The legend will play his third World Cup final and seek his second title. The post World Cup 2026 the Soccer Final Written for Messi: Will Spain Be the Spoiler? Argentina-Spain Sunday at 2pm appeared first on Newsroom Panama .

results.title: America already tried - and failed - at permanent daylight saving time. Could it work now?
results.description: The twice-yearly changing of the clocks in the United States could be a thing of the past if legislation currently in Congress that calls for permanent daylight time makes it through. America has tried it before, most recently in the 1970s, and it didn't last.

results.title: Over a third of Americans use credit card rewards for essentials
results.description: The report adds to growing evidence that consumers are using every financial tool in their arsenal to manage higher living costs.
